Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,382Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 58

entry.title: captain, oh captain
entry.summary:
Author: rotgruenweiss

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,031Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 13

Summary: Jason Todd, drafted in the fourth round of the NHL draft. All his life he had worked towards being number one, to be able to prove everyone wrong on him being a talentless kid from the streets and to be able to easen up the way for kids like him. Then he got injured, spent a year on recovery and still got drafted, in the fourth round. Being a fourth round pick meant he would have to spend time in their junior team, play on maybe fourth line there and IF he made it to the NHL, they would want him to be someone who stood in for their top talents. Then the call came. They wanted him in their rookie camp, with the wish of him joining pre-season camp as well and playing the pre-season games. Jason would go, and prove the coaches that he was worth being put onto the main roster, that he could protect their star rookies while taking out their competitors. He was a menace during rookie camp. The coaches were positively surprised by him, praised him but also told him to be less of an Enforcer. To help him develop into the right direction, they assigned him to live with none other than their Captain and starplayer, Richard Grayson.

entry.title: Tired Stars
entry.summary:
Author: ResidentJazz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,667Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 517

Summary: Dick Grayson has always known how to smile on command, how to play the part people expect — even when it tears him apart. After a public breakdown and a mission that pushes him past his limits, Bruce’s disappointment feels like another verdict he can’t escape. But Jason refuses to let him spiral alone. In the quiet of a safe house, between coffee that tastes like ash, late-night movies, and the weight of a case too close to home, Dick has to confront the question he’s never dared to ask: who is he when he isn’t what Bruce made him? One step at a time, he’ll have to find out.

entry.title: Birds of Prey
entry.summary:
Author: Castle53

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,189Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 26

Summary: Jason Todd was expecting an interesting year. He wasn't expecting his entire past to be thrown into his lap, but what can you do? Dick's been missing for two years. Even he doesn't know where he was. But he killed them all. Tim never thought of Bruce as a good father, but he never thought the man would stoop this far. Roy wants to get out of heroism, thank you very much. Arthur Fleck started the year with one adopted son, and now he's got four. Fantastic.   (Guys I'm a child and I'm broke, I can't pay for comics or art. If you want to gift art, I'd be very happy to take it, and I also do art trades, but I cannot pay for services. Thank you.)

entry.title: I'll Build You Back (Somehow)
entry.summary:
Author: WakingNightmares

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,174Chapters: 12/16Kudos: 545

Summary: Jason gives him an exasperated look as they get to the front door. “Seriously, Dick. I’m fine. Promise. I’ve had a helluva lot worse than this, and still managed a patrol, with a lot less sleep than this. I’ll take it easy, keep the ass-kickin’ to a minimum tonight, alright?” He says with a grin. And fuck the things Dick would do for that grin. It erases the hard edges, the cold and calculating Red Hood, leaving behind a mischievous looking young man, rather than a younger version of Bruce. So he sighs. “Fine. Just call me if you need anything, okay? I’m gonna be in town for a few days anyways, until we get this Two-Face thing figured out, so it’s not like it’s out of my way,” Dick says as he steps outside into the driveway. “Besides, it’d be nice to hang out more often.” Jason gives Dick an unsure look, and for a moment, Dick can feel his heart sink a bit. Did Jason not enjoy their breakfast? Dick had intruded, to be fair, but Jason had seemed to enjoy - “Yeah? You wanna hang?”

entry.summary:
Author: bluewingsofthenight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,478Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 59

Summary: Jason knows Dick is flexible. It’s part of their training, heck Jason might be one of the least flexible in the family, but he can still do the splits (and is proud of it). Still, watching Dick casually lift his leg higher than his head and reaching back to hold it, transitioning smoothly into the pose with a blank, bored face and headphones on is undeniably hot and never fails to make Jason feel heat curl in his chest and then spike with want.

entry.title: The Little Wing Loophole
entry.summary:
Author: kitnotkat95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,791Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 52

Summary: Dick was not pleased. If you asked him, and really you should in his opinion, Slade was being completely unreasonable. Sure maybe he'd gotten a little too cheeky when the older man had been packing for another work trip. Daddy'd been going on too many of those lately in Dick's defense, so really it was very unfair that he wasn't allowed to cum until Daddy came back. Especially when Dick was already feeling riled up from having Jason coming to visit again. Jason didn't even have any stupid rules about whether or not he could get off. Well once Dick thought about it, technically Jason didn't have a rule about whether or not he could make Dick come if that's what he wanted to do, and Jason did really like that. So then really Dick would just be being helpful taking care of Jason until Slade got back, and how could Dick get in trouble for that?

entry.title: Renegade
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 325,866Chapters: 43/?Kudos: 2,493

Summary: Five years after Robin had vanished holding Starfire’s body, the second Robin, Jason Todd, disappeared on his second mission with the Teen Titans. When he woke up in an unfamiliar place, Jason had no idea what would happen to him in the coming months, and that soon he would know the former Robin—now Renegade—intimately, during his long captivity. Or: The one where Dick Grayson took Slade’s offer to be his apprentice and Jason pays the price.

entry.title: My Perfect Big Brother's Dirty Secret
entry.summary:
Author: Lucerne3149D

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,467Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: Dick Grayson has always been the perfect older brother — responsible, noble, and in control. But when Jason and Tim decide they've waited long enough, they corner him in his own bedroom, determined to shatter his golden boy facade.What starts as "just this once" quickly spirals into something far more addictive. Begging, riding, and creampies become their new normal as the two younger brothers relentlessly seduce their big brother, forcing him to confront just how much he loves being their good, filthy, caring older brother.Dick keeps trying to resist.Jason and Tim have no intention of letting him.A filthy Batfamily threesome story about corruption, brotherly "love," and how long a responsible man can pretend to be pure when his little brothers won't stop begging for his cock.

entry.title: Broken to Hand
entry.summary:
Author: guwonim

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,496Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 99

Summary: Dick has a few very strict rules when it comes to playing with his baby brother. He expects Jason to take every slap, every bite, and every ruthless thrust without a single complaint. He expects him to remember that his sweet hole, his mind, and his heart belong to Dick and no one else. He calls it adoration. He calls it spoiling him rotten. And as he pulls out the ropes to anchor Jason directly to him, Dick is about to show his Little Wing exactly what happens to good boys who obey.
